meaning: <意>n.(由杜松子酒、苦艾酒等搀合而成的) 内格罗尼酒
examples: Then we were given the chance to make five cocktails: a margarita, sidecar, Manhattan, Negroni and two kinds of daiquiris.
Had the Negroni not been in the running, the Mojito, with its clumps of mint and chilly sweetness, would have won handily.
Making a negroni is pretty easy, although chances are that you will have to go out and buy at least one of the three ingredients.
